start.text: The moon is high over the marsh. You are Shadowpaw, an apprentice of ShadowClan. Your leader, Tigerstar, calls you to his den. 'Shadowpaw,' he growls. 'I have a secret mission for you. You must go to the edge of the forest and find the glowing herb. Do not let the other Clans see you.'

choices.text: Ask why it must be a secret

ask_leader.text: Tigerstar narrows his eyes. 'Because the other Clans are greedy! They would steal the herb for themselves. Now, go!' You realize you have no choice but to obey.

leave_camp.text: You creep out of the ShadowClan camp. The pine needles are soft under your paws. Soon, you reach the border with ThunderClan. You hear the sound of snapping twigs. A patrol is nearby!

choices.text: Hide in a thick gorse bush
Try to run past them quickly

hide_bushes.text: You squeeze into the prickly bush. Your heart beats fast. Two ThunderClan warriors walk past. 'I smell ShadowClan,' one says, but they don't see you. They keep walking towards the lake.

choices.text: Wait until they are gone, then continue

run_past.text: You dash across the clearing, but a ginger warrior spots you! 'Hey! ShadowClan cat!' he yells. You are fast, but they know this forest better than you.

choices.text: Hide in a deep rabbit hole

climb_tree.text: ShadowClan cats aren't famous for climbing, but fear makes you fast. You reach a high branch just as the warriors arrive below. They growl but eventually leave to continue their patrol.

choices.text: Climb down and find the herb

continue_path.text: You reach the edge of the forest where the trees are thin. In a small valley, you see a strange, glowing green herb. It smells like fresh rain. This must be it!

choices.text: Check if anyone is watching first

watch_valley.text: You look around and see a WindClan apprentice watching the valley from a hill. He hasn't seen you yet. If you move quietly, you can get the herb.

pick_herb.text: You take the herb in your mouth. It tastes bitter. Now you must return to Tigerstar. You decide to take a different way back, near the river.

stepping_stones.text: The stones are covered in green slime. You slip! The river is cold and fast. You manage to climb out, but you are soaking wet and tired.

river_bank.text: The walk is longer, but safer. You see a RiverClan cat fishing, but you stay hidden in the long grass. You are almost home.

return_approach.text: As you approach the camp, your mentor, Nightfeather, stops you. 'Where have you been, Shadowpaw?' she asks suspiciously.

tell_truth.text: Nightfeather sighs. 'Tigerstar shouldn't send apprentices on such dangerous missions alone. But you were brave. Go to him.'

lie_mentor.text: 'Hunting? Without any prey?' Nightfeather narrows her eyes. She knows you are lying, but she lets you pass. 'Tigerstar is waiting for you.'

success.text: Tigerstar takes the herb. 'Well done, Shadowpaw. You have proven your loyalty to ShadowClan. One day, you will be a great warrior.' You feel proud as you go to the apprentices' den to sleep.

rabbit_hole.text: You jump into the hole, but it's occupied by a very angry badger! You have to run away as fast as you can. You get lost in the deep woods. The mission is a failure.

vocabulary.apprentice: a young cat training to become a warrior
vocabulary.marsh: a type of wet land with lots of grass and water
vocabulary.patrol: a group of cats walking around to protect their territory
vocabulary.gorse: a prickly bush with yellow flowers
vocabulary.clearing: an open space in the forest with no trees
vocabulary.loyalty: staying true and faithful to your friends or Clan
vocabulary.mentor: an older cat who teaches a younger cat
vocabulary.suspiciously: acting like you think someone is doing something wrong
